description: Represents a completed or in-progress DynamoDB table export to S3.

ExportArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the export.

TableName.description: The name of the table that was exported.

ExportId.description: The unique identifier of the export.

ExportStatus.description: Export can be in one of the following states: IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, or FAILED.

TableArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the table that was exported.

TableId.description: Unique ID of the table that was exported.

ExportTime.description: Point in time from which table data was exported, in ISO 8601 format.

S3Bucket.description: The name of the Amazon S3 bucket containing the export.

S3BucketOwner.description: The ID of the Amazon Web Services account that owns the bucket containing the export.

S3Prefix.description: The Amazon S3 bucket prefix used as the file name and path of the exported snapshot.

S3SseAlgorithm.description: Type of encryption used on the bucket where export data is stored.

ExportFormat.description: The format of the exported data.

ExportType.description: The type of export that was performed.

StartTime.description: The time at which the export task began, in ISO 8601 format.

EndTime.description: The time at which the export task completed, in ISO 8601 format.

ExportManifest.description: The name of the manifest file for the export task.

BilledSizeBytes.description: The billable size of the table export.
